text: As I step into this vivid and thoughtfully designed space, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The vibrant wall and the emphasis on research and development stir my mind toward possibility and discovery. Yet, the words on the screen evoke a slight sense of disquiet—a reminder of how easily perception falters, which resonates with my own uncertainty in a new environment. I feel both expectant and contemplative, aware that clarity is something to be continuously sought.
